products.name: Third Axis
products.descriptor: Third-axis stabilization accessory for NextVision gimbal cameras

products.name: H-Mounting
products.descriptor: Horizontal camera mounting bracket isolating NextVision cameras from airframe vibrations

evidence.snippet:
**H-Mounting** enable operators to mount NextVision cameras **horizontally**, providing a stable platform and isolating the camera from airframe vibrations.
The lightweight yet rigid structure ensures **smooth imaging performance**, even in high-movement flight environments, while maintaining **optimal alignment and stability**.

products.name: Raptor-360
products.descriptor: RAPTOR variant with continuous 360° roll rotation for zero-blind-spot aerial surveillance

evidence.snippet:
Raptor-360
----------
#### Continuous 360° Roll
The Raptor-360 continuous roll rotation guarantees uninterrupted coverage from every angle. With infinite yaw movement and advanced stabilization, operators can seamlessly scan wide areas, track moving targets without losing lock, and maintain total situational awareness – with zero blind zones.

products.name: DragonEye2-Gen2

evidence.snippet:

--------------
Dust and Water Resistant
DragonEye2-Gen2 is protected against dust and water splashes, ensuring reliable operation in challenging environments.

unresolved_questions: NIGHTHAWK2 (base, 250 g): its dedicated page (resource-0007, cameras-cpt/nighthawk2) was fetched but contained only navigation with no product body content — specs were inferred from the 'Additional Cameras' listing on other product pages. May need a re-fetch or JavaScript rendering to recover full product detail.
X80 dedicated product page (resource-0012) was skipped_budget; specs are inferred from the 250-camera listing only (x80 zoom, 145 g). No IR sensor spec or stabilization details available.

Individual TRIP sub-pages (accessories-cpt/trip-2, trip-5, trip-6, trip-6-ssd) were all skipped_class_budget; TRIP 2 in particular has no size/weight spec in the fetched trip-series page — only feature icons.
DragonEye2-3X is listed in the DRAGONEYE2 family section but was not in the triage list; omitted per instructions.
